compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add commit pre-condition and observation tracking to Step 8
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Modify Step 8 in plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md:
- Add pre-condition check: read batch completion record, verify all candidate entries GREEN before commit
- If any entry not GREEN, halt and surface incomplete candidates to user
- Add SC-6 observation tracking: after commit, note whether scan surfaced candidates and whether agent separation produced divergent conclusions
- Reference tracking ticket creation for dogfooding observation collection

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Task 8fee-554f test_commit_precondition passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-step.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_commit_precondition.*PASS'
- [ ] Task 8fee-554f test_observation_tracking passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-step.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_observation_tracking.*PASS'
